title.rendered: Thank you for subscribing to Nonprofit Tech for Good!

content.rendered:
Founded in 2005, Nonprofit Tech for Good focuses on providing useful, easy-to-understand news and resources related to digital marketing and fundraising.

1) Earn a Certificate from Nonprofit Tech for Good

Nonprofit Tech for Good offers three low-cost certificate programs for nonprofit professionals. The curriculum covers digital marketing, online fundraising, social media, and artificial intelligence (AI). To earn the certificates, you can attend the webinars live or view the recordings – or a combination of both.

2) Attend a Webinar

Nonprofit Tech for Good regularly hosts free and low-cost webinars for the nonprofit sector. If you can not attend a webinar live, you can still register in order to be emailed a link to the recording within 24-48 hours of the end of the webinar.

3) Follow Nonprofit Tech for Good on Social Media

  • Facebook Page and Facebook Group
  • LinkedIn Page and LinkedIn Groups: Social Media for Nonprofit Organizations, Online Fundraising for Nonprofit Organizations, Website & Email Marketing for Nonprofit Organizations
  • Instagram
  • Threads
  • Bluesky
  • X
  • Pinterest

Thank you again and welcome!
Heather Mansfield
Founder and editor-in-chief
Nonprofit Tech for Good
